date_notes: March 31 2025 first rejection documented in UCP Notwithstanding Analysis project file. Distinct from the September 28-29 2025 rejection of the tentative agreement.
title_en: Teachers reject first memorandum of agreement in central bargaining
title_fr: Les enseignants rejettent un premier protocole d'accord lors des négociations centrales
description_en: ATA members reject a first memorandum of agreement in central bargaining. The rejection continues a pattern of unresolved central bargaining that will extend through the summer of 2025. Key unresolved issues at this stage: wage indexation, class-size reporting and caps, and educational assistant staffing levels. This is the first of two rejection votes; a second rejection of a tentative agreement follows in September 2025.
